title: Expand review-validity benchmark family coverage for v3.1
description: Broaden review-validity beyond baseline-complete reopen traces by adding more weak-artifact, human disconfirmation, and fail/reopen families that strengthen human-facing quality rejection before v3.1.0.
triage_notes: Follow-up after closing TASK-029 baseline operationalization. A complementary RV-002 runtime-generated weak-artifact reopen family has now been recorded, so the remaining gap is broader human disconfirmation source diversity rather than absence of a weak-artifact reopen family.
